Three farm children are left orphaned, leaving Steve to help the oldest child fight a custody battle. Vernon opens a campsite, but it is David who is left to entertain the campers.
Steve tries out community policing when he takes a group of troublesome lads on an outward bound course. Vernon tries to get involved with eastern mysticism.

programmes.show_name: Paul O'Grady: For The Love Of Dogs
programmes.show_description: With exclusive access, Paul O'Grady follows life at Battersea Dogs and Cats Home, as dedicated staff care for animals in need sharing heartbreaking stories and warm happy endings.
